title: Exclusive tour for MJCCA Day Camps families
excerpt: Nestled in the North Georgia mountains on more than 500 acres with two lakes, Camp Barney Medintz offers a meaningful and transformative Jewish camping experience for campers completing K – 10th grade. During one-week, two-week, and four-week sessions, campers build lifelong friendships, gain independence, challenge themselves, and strengthen their Jewish identities, all while having the […]
contentHtml:
Nestled in the North Georgia mountains on more than 500 acres with two lakes, Camp Barney Medintz offers a meaningful and transformative Jewish camping experience for campers completing K – 10th grade. During one-week, two-week, and four-week sessions, campers build lifelong friendships, gain independence, challenge themselves, and strengthen their Jewish identities, all while having the best summer!

Sunday, July 7, 10:00 – 11:45 am

We invite you to see the excitement of camp in action and learn about all our amazing activities at a Summer Tour for MJCCA Day Campers only!

This tour is for MJCCA Day Camps families who do not have a child at Camp Barney Medintz at the time of the tour.

Additional Summer Tours are Sundays, June 9 and July 14 and Fall Tours are Sundays, August 6 and September 8. RSVP is required for tours at campbarney.org/camptours.


RSVPs are now closed.
contentText:
Nestled in the North Georgia mountains on more than 500 acres with two lakes, Camp Barney Medintz offers a meaningful and transformative Jewish camping experience for campers completing K – 10th grade. During one-week, two-week, and four-week sessions, campers build lifelong friendships, gain independence, challenge themselves, and strengthen their Jewish identities, all while having the best summer!

Sunday, July 7, 10:00 – 11:45 am

We invite you to see the excitement of camp in action and learn about all our amazing activities at a Summer Tour for MJCCA Day Campers only! 

This tour is for MJCCA Day Camps families who do not have a child at Camp Barney Medintz at the time of the tour.

Additional Summer Tours are Sundays, June 9 and July 14 and Fall Tours are Sundays, August 6 and September 8. RSVP is required for tours at 
campbarney.org/camptours
.

RSVPs are now closed.
